resources.string: Do you really want to delete \"%1$s\"?
Please use UnifiedViewerScreen for PDF files
Do you really want to permanently delete all drawings/annotations on this page?
No chapters found. Showing page list as fallback.
No text found on this page.
No active note to save drawing
⚠ No DataPad connection - Map position unavailable
ℹ Waiting for valid position data…
tip: tap lock to look around the map
tip: tap lock to look around the map
Delete downloaded map tiles stored on the device (osmdroid cache). Use only when you want to free space or force re-download.
This will delete all downloaded map tiles (osmdroid cache). Continue?
Delete the internal map database and re-import the packaged map_data.db from app assets. Use this to refresh markers and map details.
This will delete the internal map database and re-import the packaged database. The app will restart to reload map data. Continue?
Note: Aviation sectional charts require additional configuration. See docs/technical/AVIATION_MAPS.md
Note: Aviation sectional charts require additional configuration. See docs/technical/AVIATION_MAPS.md
Shows a heading indicator centered on the aircraft (degrees)
Concentric distance rings (1/2/5 NM and scaled) to estimate distances
Maximum radius for range rings (nautical miles). Slide to increase number/extent of rings (1..500 NM).
Are you sure you want to delete \'%1$s\'? This action cannot be undone.
Must be an integer between 0 and 10
• Changing settings will restart the UDP socket • Leave Bind IP empty to listen on all interfaces • Default port: 5010
Enable or disable DataPad. When disabled the app will not listen for UDP telemetry and DataPad UI controls will be hidden.
Secure session-based encryption is now always on.
Used to identify this device during handshake
Leave empty for broadcast discovery (less secure)
• Device must be added to authorized_devices.json on DCS server\n• Handshake establishes session key automatically\n• Session key changes each connection (Forward Secrecy)
Choose which DCS maps should display markers on the map viewer. Default: Caucasus and Marianas.
Select which maps you want to see markers for:
No maps with markers were found in the database
This will reset to show markers from Caucasus and Marianas maps only. Continue?
This will show all bundled aircraft categories. Continue?
This will delete all files from internal storage and re-import bundled assets. Continue?
Reset floating action button positions to defaults
Change the size of all floating action buttons
Configure which aircraft appear in the browser
View the internal tag configuration JSON
No folder selected. Tap to select.
Select an external folder to import PDF and markdown files from
Language saved. Please restart the app for changes to take effect.
No files were imported automatically. Would you like to pick files or a folder to import?\n(Recommended for PDFs and markdown files)
A folder with this name already exists
File is already in this category
Copy this Base64 public key into the server\'s authorized_devices.json entry
Device ID + Public Key copied to clipboard ✅
Import a file or the whole folder (all .pdf/.md files)?

A new version of the airport/location database is available.

Current version: %1$d
New version: %2$d
Merge: Import new locations while keeping your existing data
Clean Import: Wipe internal database and import all data from new version (recommended for major updates)
Skip: Don\'t import now (can be triggered manually later)
Add waypoints manually or tap locations on the map
Lock waypoints to fix their position
Locked waypoints stay in place when optimizing the route
• Yellow warning when below warning height\n• Red warning when below 50% of warning height
Enter pattern altitude above ground level (AGL) in feet:
Enter a value between 500 and 5000 ft
This will remove all drawings from the map. Are you sure?
This action is permanent. Tap "Confirm" to delete all drawings.
Live attitude and turn indicators (drag to reposition)
Record and display aircraft position history
Map database not ready — please tap again to retry.
This will delete all tracked units and their history. This cannot be undone.
When disabled, the list will not be auto-sorted; it will show by insertion order.
When entity tracking is disabled, the map can still display historical/last-known unit positions.
Lower = smoother movement, higher = better performance
Start DCS with DataPad enabled to track units
Automatically highlight units and show labels on map
Configure your essential settings to get started quickly.
Enable real-time telemetry integration with DCS World
Choose which aircraft checklists to display in your library
Choose which tactical maps to make available
Re-configure aircraft, maps, and other initial settings
Track and display nearby aircraft and ground units on the map
